calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TARGET NATIONAL BANK's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off calendar. The matter is stayed. A bankruptcy notice was filed with the San Mateo Sheriff on October 7, 2013. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)
